title: Crash reports in Helldivers 2

evidence.content:
Running this game on linux has been impossible, even while nearly every other title out there is at least playable with proton, this has given me no end of grief.

over 10 hours of troubleshooting, I have experienced severe overheating, abysmal framerates, random crashes when no changes have been

Game is fun but has had weird bugs since launch that have yet to be fixed. Sometimes my pc freezes upon closing the game with the "quit" option. Game balance is wishy-washy. Sometimes weapons feel good, with good aim you can deal with most enemies quickly. But with recent updates, there are way too

Helldivers 2 is a great game, I don't want to give a negative tone, but there's to many bugs, to many crashes, my PC shut's down sometimes even on the lowest settings.

I want to ask arrowhead to fix there Game mostly for the crashes, hard lock's and the PC's shutting down. I don't believe this is a
